quoteLast: when the waiting multitude saw two blinding flashes of light one following the other in quick succession.
title: The History of Korea (vol. 2 of 2)
author: Hulbert, Homer B. (Homer Bezaleel), 1863-1949

quoteFirst: This extraordinary performance was concluded on the 12th of July, at
quoteTime: thirty-seven minutes past three in the afternoon
title:
Pedestrianism; or, An Account of the Performances of Celebrated Pedestrians During the Last and Present Century.

quoteFirst: “If you take the facts as we know them,” he went on, “it’s clear that Neville Shandon could not have reached the Maze before
quoteLast: ; and the second murder was over before 4.5 p.m. As a matter of fact, the times really allow less margin than that, for Neville’s body was found at 3.52 p.m. and both were probably dead by that time.”
title: Murder in the maze
author: Connington, J. J., 1880-1947
